entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2019 and currently presented by its official legal page as operated by BICONOMY PTE. LTD with a registered address in the British Virgin Islands, while maintaining a globally distributed operating footprint.
entity.notes: Older Biconomy materials described the exchange as headquartered in Canada, but the current official About page identifies BICONOMY PTE. LTD and a British Virgin Islands registered address. HEI therefore replaces the Canada-only origin with British Virgin Islands / global while preserving the historical inconsistency in this note.

expected.summary: Canada-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the Biconomy Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2019 and currently presented by its official legal page as operated by BICONOMY PTE. LTD with a registered address in the British Virgin Islands, while maintaining a globally distributed operating footprint.
changes.notes: Older Biconomy materials described the exchange as headquartered in Canada, but the current official About page identifies BICONOMY PTE. LTD and a British Virgin Islands registered address. HEI therefore replaces the Canada-only origin with British Virgin Islands / global while preserving the historical inconsistency in this note.

events.title: Biconomy Exchange was established in 2019
events.description: Biconomy Exchange began operating in 2019 as a centralized cryptocurrency trading platform serving a global user base.
events.notes: Official pages and site copyright history support the 2019 year marker but do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About Biconomy Exchange
evidence.notes: The current official About page identifies BICONOMY PTE. LTD and gives a registered address in Road Town, Tortola, British Virgin Islands.

evidence.title: Biconomy Exchange platform
evidence.notes: The official platform footer and product presentation support operation under the Biconomy Exchange identity since 2019.

evidence.title: Biconomy Exchange official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies active spot, futures, earn, launchpad, and related exchange services.
